FDCC.WarnActionsNotSelected: One or more characters/NPCs didn't select their combat action yet for this round.
FDCC.WarnRollNotAllowedHold: Rolling initiative is not allowed in Hold Initiative mode. Initiative values remain unchanged from the previous round.
FDCC.WarnNoInitiative: Please roll initiative for the combatants first.
FDCC.WarnActionsAndInitiative: Please declare all combat actions and roll initiative before starting combat.
FDCC.ConfirmRerollContent: All combatants already have an initiative score. Do you want to reset all scores and ties and re-roll initiative for everyone?
FDCC.ConfirmRemoveLastContent: All combatants have been removed from the carousel and combat has ended. Award XP anyway?
FDCC.WarnDiceFaces: The number of combatants exceeds the initiative die faces. Consider increasing the die size in FaDe settings to reduce guaranteed ties.
FDCC.WarnTiesMustBeResolved: All ties must be resolved first. / Tutte le contese devono essere risolte.
FDCC.TieRerollBlockedPendingInitiatives: All combatants must roll initiative before resolving ties.

Settings.PortraitSizeHint: Size of combatant portraits in pixels.
Settings.ShowHPBarHint: Display HP bar below each combatant portrait.
Settings.ShowHPBarToPlayersHint: If enabled, players will see HP bars on combatant cards.
Settings.ShowActionDropdownHint: Show the declared action dropdown on owned combatants.
Settings.DebugModeHint: Prints detailed information to the browser console (F12). Useful for reporting bugs to the developer.
